<!-- generated by `cataforge feedback bug` at 2026-06-15T02:35:34+00:00 -->

# 0.11.0 scaffold SKILL.md 引用自身已弃用的 cataforge docs 命令 → out-of-the-box doctor 3 FAIL

## Summary

CataForge 0.11.0 的 doctor 新增 Deprecated protocol references 检查，将 cataforge docs index/load/validate 判为 v0.11.0 deprecated（应改用 cataforge context index/read/validate）；但 0.11.0 自身打包的 scaffold SKILL.md（doc-gen / doc-nav / doc-consistency）仍引用这些旧命令，导致任何全新 0.11.0 部署 out-of-the-box doctor 即 3 FAIL。旧命令仍经别名转发可用且退出码保留，属非功能性缺陷，但 doctor 作为 Phase Transition 门禁会被该包内不一致卡红。根因：docs→context 命令改名落地 0.11.0 时漏迁这 3 个 SKILL 模板。

## Environment

- **CataForge package**: `0.11.0`
- **Scaffold version**: `0.11.0`
- **Python**: `3.14.4`
- **Platform**: `Windows-11-10.0.26200-SP0`
- **Runtime platform**: `claude-code`

## `cataforge doctor` summary

- **Exit code**: `1`
- **Failing checks**: `3`
- **Warnings**: `1`

### Failing lines

```
  FAIL cataforge docs index → use `cataforge context index` (deprecated v0.11.0)
  FAIL cataforge docs load → use `cataforge context read` (deprecated v0.11.0)
  FAIL cataforge docs validate → use `cataforge context validate` (deprecated v0.11.0)
```

### Warning lines

```
    WARN .cataforge/ source changed since last deploy — run `cataforge deploy` to refresh IDE artefacts
```

## Additional notes

修复位置（CataForge 上游源模板；下游 scaffold 为 [unchanged] 复制品，本地改会被下次 upgrade 覆盖，必须上游修）：

1. skills/doc-gen/SKILL.md — cataforge docs index → cataforge context index；cataforge docs load → cataforge context read；cataforge docs validate → cataforge context validate（doctor 命中行 14/32/57/62/90/155/157/163 等，11+ call site）
2. skills/doc-nav/SKILL.md — cataforge docs load → cataforge context read（行 17/34/57）；cataforge docs validate → cataforge context validate（行 64）
3. skills/doc-consistency/SKILL.md — cataforge docs validate → cataforge context validate（行 28/78）

验证：修后在全新部署跑 cataforge doctor，Deprecated protocol references 应 0 FAIL。
影响面：所有 0.11.0 全新部署 out-of-the-box doctor 即 RED，易误导下游以为部署损坏。
